name: DJConnect Windows 3.1.9
body:
# DJConnect Windows 3.1.9

- Tightens Ask DJ so text and future voice/push-to-talk input stay backend-owned through the Home Assistant DJConnect integration.
- Renders response-owned images, sources, items, playback actions and confirmation actions only when the backend explicitly returns them.
- Adds client identity and client message ids to command/action payloads and clears local Ask DJ cache when Home Assistant reports stale pairing.
- Keeps Demo Mode monkey-test behavior non-destructive for CI and UI stress runs.

---

Platform: Windows

Unsigned CI artifacts are intended for diagnostics and internal validation.
Windows artifacts are unsigned and are not a store/MSIX installer yet.
